description: Style Note This summer we bring to you a pair of flip-flops from barbie that your little princess will not want to take off! Featuring an attractive print and florescent green straps, this pair is a unique blend of style and comfort. Team it with a frock and a matching hairband for a hot summer day. Product Details Purple flip-flops with print and branding on footbed Green thong style straps Checked grooves on outsole Material and Care Rubber Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store under sunlight  Style NoteThis summer we bring to you a pair of flip-flops from Barbie that your little princess will not want to take off!
